summary: 14 active or upcoming tender and outreach opportunities tracked. Today added: Celtic Colours Cape Breton (Oct 9-17), Antigonish Highland Games (July 5-12), Pictou Lobster Carnival (July 3-5). SailGP dates confirmed June 21-26. No new apparel-specific tenders on MERX Atlantic Canada today. Strong event-merch pipeline building.

tenders.title: Tournament Branded Merchandise — Hockey Nova Scotia Provincials
tenders.deadlineNote: 🔥 RFP closes March 28 — THIS WEEK — URGENT
tenders.description: Hockey NS runs provincial championships from atom to midget. Sourcing branded apparel for players, officials, and spectators. Typically a direct supplier relationship.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo already works in hockey space (Mooseheads, Eagles, Wildcats). This is a natural extension.
tenders.notes: 🔥 HOT: RFP closes March 28 — 6 DAYS OUT. Brad needs to reach out to Hockey NS THIS WEEK. Apollo's CHL credibility is a major differentiator.

tenders.title: Institutional Spirit Wear & Branded Merchandise — NSCC
tenders.description: Multi-campus spirit wear contract covering hoodies, tees, hats, and branded gear for 13 campuses. Annual renewal cycle — typically tendered in spring.
tenders.fitReason: Heritage and coastal branding is on-brand for NSCC's identity. Volume across 13 campuses is significant.
tenders.notes: NSCC has 13 campuses province-wide. Getting even 2–3 campuses is a strong win.

tenders.title: Staff Uniforms & Branded Apparel — Nova Scotia Health Authority
tenders.description: NSHA periodically tenders for branded staff apparel including scrubs, polos, fleece jackets, and logoed outerwear for administrative and clinical staff across HRM facilities.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo has production capacity for branded staff apparel. NSHA is a major volume buyer.
tenders.notes: Previous award was to a local supplier. Apollo should register as a vendor on NS procurement portal.

tenders.title: Staff Branded Workwear & Apparel — Halifax Regional Municipality
tenders.description: HRM tenders branded workwear for various departments (parks, recreation, transit). Includes polo shirts, fleece layers, branded hats, and safety-compliant outerwear.
tenders.fitReason: Safety apparel may require certifications. Branded casual/recreation apparel is a strong fit.
tenders.notes: HRM Recreation is a better fit than Transit due to safety cert requirements.

tenders.title: Official Merchandise & Apparel — Sport Nova Scotia Provincial Championships
tenders.description: Sport Nova Scotia runs provincial championship events across multiple sports. Event merch (tees, hoodies, hats) is typically sourced through direct procurement or informal RFQ. Also: Team Nova Scotia apparel for 2027 Canada Winter Games (Quebec City — confirmed).
tenders.fitReason: Sports culture is core to Apollo's brand. Event merch is a natural fit and builds profile. Canada Winter Games 2027 confirmed for Quebec City — Team NS needs kitting.
tenders.notes: Recommend Brad reach out to Sport NS directly — relationship play, not a formal tender. Canada Winter Games 2027 Quebec City confirmed by federal government — pitch Team NS apparel now.

tenders.title: School Team & Athletic Apparel Supply — New Brunswick Dept. of Education
tenders.issuer: Government of New Brunswick — Dept. of Education
tenders.description: Province-wide contract for school athletic apparel including team jerseys, training gear, and spirit wear for NB public schools.
tenders.fitReason: Large volume opportunity but requires province-wide fulfillment capacity. Worth monitoring.
tenders.notes: Primarily a longer-term target once Apollo scales production. Flag for Q3 2026.

tenders.title: Athletic Apparel & Team Uniforms — Atlantic University Sport (AUS)
tenders.deadlineNote: Multi-year contract — monitor for renewal cycle
tenders.description: AUS governs university athletics across 11 Atlantic Canadian universities. Team uniform and apparel contracts are periodically tendered. Covers multiple sports.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo already works with St. FX. AUS relationship opens the door to all 11 member schools.
tenders.notes: Leverage St. FX relationship to get an intro to AUS athletics coordinator.

tenders.title: Official Event Merchandise — Nova Scotia Music Week 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Event: Nov 12–15, 2026 in Truro — pitch now for production lead time
tenders.description: Nova Scotia Music Week is a 4-day music festival, conference, and awards ceremony returning to Truro/We'kwampekitk for its 29th year. Official event merch (staff shirts, volunteer apparel, artist hospitality packs, fan tees) is typically sourced through a local supplier.
tenders.fitReason: Nova Scotia music and cultural identity is core to Apollo's brand DNA. Being on-merch for NSMW is a credibility and visibility win.
tenders.notes: Confirmed March 3, 2026. Brad should pitch Music Nova Scotia now — production lead time for Nov event means they'll be sourcing merch Q2/Q3. Ben's media network (the Advocate, Saltscapes) may have a connection.

tenders.title: Event Apparel & Merchandise — Sommo Festival PEI 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Event: Sept 11–12, 2026 at Cavendish Beach, PEI — pitch spring 2026
tenders.description: Sommo is an annual music, food, and drink festival at the Cavendish Beach Events Centre in PEI. Growing Atlantic festival with strong coastal and Maritime identity. Merch line (tees, hats, branded apparel) is a natural fit.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo's coastal-heritage aesthetic maps perfectly to this PEI beach festival. Ideal for a branded collab drop — Apollo x Sommo would be a fire story.
tenders.notes: Confirmed Sept 11–12, 2026. Outreach opportunity for collab merch or official event apparel. Pitch via sommofest.com or find organizer on social. Collab angle stronger than pure supply.

tenders.title: Event Apparel & Branded Merch — Canada Sail Grand Prix Halifax 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: 🔥 CONFIRMED: June 21–26, 2026 — pitch NOW for production lead time
tenders.description: SailGP is returning to Halifax Harbour June 21–26, 2026. 12 international teams racing in F50 hydrofoil boats. Tickets already sold out. Massive coastal/maritime identity event drawing international crowd. Official branded apparel, staff uniforms, and fan merch opportunity. City of Halifax investing $1M from marketing levy reserve.
tenders.fitReason: Halifax harbour + coastal brand identity = textbook Apollo match. High-visibility event with serious tourism draw. Apollo's coastal grit aesthetic is made for this.
tenders.notes: DATES CONFIRMED: June 21-26, 2026. City backing $1M in marketing. Production lead time means Brad needs to pitch NOW — 90 days out. Contact SailGP Canada event team or pitch through Halifax Tourism.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel & Merchandise — Antigonish Highland Games 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: July 5–12, 2026 — pitch spring 2026 for lead time
tenders.description: The Antigonish Highland Games are the longest-running Highland Games outside Scotland, founded 1861. 7-day event in Antigonish, NS drawing thousands. Vendors welcome — official merch and apparel opportunity. Scottish/Celtic heritage identity with deep Nova Scotia roots.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo's heritage coastal identity maps beautifully to this historic Scottish-Nova Scotian celebration. Located near Pictou — this is Apollo's home turf.
tenders.notes: NEW — July 5-12, 2026. Vendor application required through website. Official event apparel or merchandise booth — both angles worth pitching. Connected to St. FX and Antigonish community.

tenders.title: Official Event Merch — Pictou Lobster Carnival 2026
tenders.description: Pictou Lobster Carnival is an annual celebration of the lobster fishing season in Pictou, NS — Apollo's home base. Live music, parades, carnival rides, lobster boat races. Community event drawing thousands to downtown Pictou.
tenders.fitReason: THIS IS APOLLO'S BACKYARD. Pictou is where Apollo is based. This is the easiest relationship play on the board — walk across town and introduce yourself.
tenders.notes: NEW — July 3-5, 2026 in Pictou. Apollo Originals is from Pictou NS — this is a local credibility play and community relationship builder. Reach out to Lobster Carnival committee now. Official tees, staff shirts, merch.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel — Celtic Colours International Festival 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Oct 9–17, 2026 — pitch Q2 2026 for production lead time
tenders.description: Celtic Colours is a 9-day Cape Breton Island festival celebrating Celtic music and culture across dozens of communities. One of Canada's premier music festivals, drawing international visitors. Staff, volunteer, and official event apparel sourced annually.
tenders.fitReason: Cape Breton cultural identity + coastal heritage = Apollo at its core. Apollo already has Cape Breton presence (Eagles, Cabot Links). Celtic Colours is a natural extension.
tenders.notes: NEW — Oct 9-17, 2026. Leverage Cape Breton Eagles relationship to get intro to festival organizers. Staff/volunteer apparel + collab drop is the pitch. Pitch Q2 for production lead time on fall event.

tenders.title: Custom Branded Apparel — Newfoundland Regiment (QMJHL)
tenders.deadlineNote: New franchise — outreach opportunity during off-season
tenders.description: The Newfoundland Regiment is the brand-new QMJHL team based in St. John's, NL (relocated from Acadie-Bathurst Titan). New franchise building its identity, fan culture, and merch program. Playing at Mary Brown's Centre.
tenders.fitReason: Brand-new QMJHL team building everything from scratch. Apollo has proven QMJHL credibility (Mooseheads, Eagles, Wildcats). Atlantic hockey network play — this is a warm intro, not a cold call.
tenders.notes: NEW — brand new QMJHL franchise. Apollo's QMJHL relationships are the door opener here. Reach out during off-season when teams are planning next year's merch. Fan lifestyle apparel collab is the angle.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel — Evergreen Festival Halifax 2026
tenders.description: Evergreen Festival is a 4-week outdoor late fall/early winter celebration of Nova Scotian culture, food, spirits, craft, art, and memorable experiences in Halifax. Listed in Tourism Nova Scotia's top 2026 events calendar.
tenders.fitReason: Nova Scotian culture, craft, and coastal identity are core to Apollo's DNA. Staff and volunteer apparel for a multi-week event is a solid production run.
tenders.notes: NEW — appeared in Tourism Nova Scotia's 2026 don't-miss events list. Pitch for official staff/volunteer apparel or collab merch drop. Event celebrates Nova Scotian identity — Apollo is the brand for this.
